posts.author: Bryan
posts.title: Top nav improvement
posts.body: The top nav should be visible no matter what page the user is on. And the top nav should have enough margin at the top so that the iPhone status area doesn’t cover up the content. And fix the game day nav link - the green dot is making it wrap.

posts.author: Bryan
posts.title: Improve the top nav bar
posts.body: The top nav bar doesn’t have enough space at the top and is showing up underneath the iPhone status bar things. Also, don’t wrap the nav links - one scrollable row is ok.
